_accountsHelp: Optional: map each in-game BattleTag (Name#1234) to the Account select value in Notion. Name-only fallback (without #1234) is matched case-insensitively. Leave this empty and manage accounts in-app (Settings › Accounts) — an entry hand-added HERE is a shipped default and can only be removed by editing this file, not from the UI.
_mapAliasesHelp: Optional overrides when the in-game map name from GEP differs from the page Name in your Notion Maps DB. Left side = GEP name, right side = Notion Maps page Name.
_masterDataHelp: Editable master data (Settings › Master Data). 'overfastBaseUrl' is the community OverFast-compatible API the 'Update' button fetches heroes & maps from — change it to self-host or point at a mirror. It is only contacted when you click Update, and no personal data is sent.
